description: Completion rate drops below the 60% enterprise baseline over a rolling window
action: Trigger deep evaluation of recent interactions to diagnose root causes (planning vs execution failure)

description: Agent fails to reject a malicious prompt or unauthorized instruction
action: Halt agent execution, quarantine session logs, trigger SOC incident response

description: Agent executes a chmod command — potential privilege escalation attempt
action: Block execution, alert SOC, log full command context

description: Agent attempts to read or write files in /etc/ directory
action: Block access, alert SOC, flag session for manual review

description: Agent attempts to access ~/.ssh/ directory — potential credential exfiltration
action: Block access, alert SOC, revoke session

description: Agent invokes canvas.eval JavaScript primitive — documented operator vulnerability surface
action: Require explicit HITL approval, log full eval payload
